title: Add search button for columns for boards that have a lot of columns, to navigate between them
excerpt: Sort or search with the keyword for the columns, for boards that have a lot of columns, to navigate between them

posts.author: ofuks001 (Omara Fuks)
posts.cookedHtml: Sort or search with the keyword for the columns, for boards that have a lot of columns, to navigate between them

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there @ofuks001!

Thank you for this request!

It will be passed it to our R&D team so it can be considered

Cheers,
-Matias

posts.author: FredW (Frederik Wongel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, has something come of this?
We also use boards with many columns, and it would help greatly if there was a way to quickly search for and jump to a sepcific column wihtout having to scroll manually.
Kind regards
Fred
